summary: Frontend-only static React marketing site tested end-to-end via Playwright at preview URL. All 5 pages render, nav works, direct-URL access works (dev server serves index.html), assets serve HTTP 200, PDFs download, contact form graceful error works, mobile menu opens/closes, and production build succeeds. Two minor issues found (duplicate testids in Services, mobile-nav-link naming mismatch with spec).

ui_bugs.issue: Ingredients grid reuses data-testid='produce-item-{i}' from BentoGrid — results in 12 elements sharing only 6 unique testids (produce-item-0..5 appear twice on /services). Ingredients grid should use a distinct pattern like ingredient-item-{i}.

Spec asks mobile menu links to follow data-testid='nav-link-{label}' pattern; implementation uses 'mobile-nav-link-{label}'. Functionality is correct (menu opens, links route, auto-closes) but selector pattern deviates from spec. Consider adding alias or updating spec.

action_items: Rename Ingredients grid testids in Services.jsx to 'ingredient-item-{i}' (or make BentoGrid accept a testId prefix prop) to avoid duplicate testids.
Optional: align mobile menu link testids with 'nav-link-{label}' pattern (or duplicate as both).
critical_code_review_comments: BentoGrid in Services.jsx hardcodes testId prefix — accept it as a prop to prevent duplicate ids when reused.
Web3Forms access key is a placeholder in /app/frontend/src/data/site.js — expected per user choice; graceful error path correctly implemented.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes — good testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static site, no backend. All routes are client-side via BrowserRouter. Public URL: https://commodity-hub-37.preview.emergentagent.com. Curl assets with User-Agent header (urllib default UA gets 403 from preview ingress). Verified: yarn build succeeds, /build contains index.html, .htaccess, images/, pdfs/, hashed bundles. Contact form intentionally shows graceful error because Web3Forms access key is placeholder in /app/frontend/src/data/site.js.

detailed_verification.contact_form_graceful_error_shown: 'Contact form is not yet configured. Please email us directly at shivendra@thoroughbredexports.com'
